metadata.description: Keel — discipline for Claude Code that survives compaction. Claude forgets after a few compactions: the plan, the rules, the 'we already tried that'. Keel adds durable memory rituals, staged verification gates before bulk runs, and safety hooks that block secret leaks and dangerous commands. This marketplace installs the TOOLING (skills · subagents · hooks); clone the repo for the discipline docs (rules.md, HANDOVER/LESSONS/TASKS/PLAN) and the deny/ask permissions a plugin cannot ship.

plugins.name: keel
plugins.description: Discipline that survives compaction: durable memory rituals (handover · lessons · tasks), staged verification gates before bulk runs, and hooks that block secret leaks + dangerous commands. Installs the TOOLING — 11 /keel-* skills, 3 subagents (researcher · verifier · auditor), memory + safety hooks. A plugin CANNOT ship permissions or docs, so also clone github.com/muratsilahtaroglu/claude-code-starter-kit to get rules.md, the HANDOVER/LESSONS/TASKS/PLAN memory files, and the deny/ask permission rules.
